item.title: New NHS Standards Target Leading Causes of Maternal Death
item.description: New clinical standards from NHS England targeting blood clots, mental health, haemorrhage, and epilepsy aim to cut maternal deaths by March 2027. Meds...

item.title: EMA Greenlights Drugs for MS and Spinal Muscular Atrophy
item.description: Cenrifki prevents MS disease progression and Itvisma delivers a healthy gene-to-cell nuclei, addressing the root cause of SMA. Medscape News Europe

item.title: EMA Recommends Generic in Advanced/Metastatic Breast Cancer
item.description: Palbociclib slows cancer cell proliferation in patients with HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer. Medscape News Europe

item.title: ICIs Show High Responses in Mediastinal B-Cell Lymphoma
item.description: Pembrolizumab and nivolumab show favorable response rates with or without consolidation therapy. Medscape Medical News

item.title: HBP May Pose Major Risks for Young Veterans Post-9/11
item.description: A new trend emerging in post-9/11 veterans shows that roughly half of this young adult group has hypertension, and more than half of those cases go un...
